description: Manage workspace membership: invite, roles, revoke, and audit.

userStories.title: Add membership schema and invitation token
userStories.description: As an admin, I want a membership table and invitation tokens so members can be invited by email.
acceptanceCriteria: Add memberships table or extend users->workspaces relation
Add invitation token table or field and expiry

userStories.title: Invite member by email
userStories.description: As an admin, I want to invite a member by email so they can join the workspace via invitation link.
acceptanceCriteria: Invite endpoint accepts email and sends invitation link with token
Invitation flow creates pending membership and redeems token to create member

userStories.title: Change member role
userStories.description: As an admin, I want to change a member's role between viewer, editor, and admin so permissions update.
acceptanceCriteria: Add endpoint to change role and persist change
Role change appears immediately in UI

userStories.title: Revoke workspace access
userStories.description: As an admin, I want to revoke a member's access so they can no longer access workspace resources.
acceptanceCriteria: Add revoke endpoint that disables membership
Revoked member cannot access workspace resources

userStories.title: Record membership changes in audit log and UI view
userStories.description: As an admin, I want membership changes recorded and reviewable so I can audit invites, role changes, and revocations.
acceptanceCriteria: Persist audit events for invite, role change, revoke
Expose recent membership changes in workspace settings page
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill
